subcodes.title: Words to the Obers, spoken on 1920-05-06
subcodes.first_line: I hope that God willing, there shall be many such tables laid out... All the gatherings that are formed are based on certain interests, but this gathering has no object except the Divine Love.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
